channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Fancy stack loses: hard numbers on simplicity
item.description: Cut dashboard response time 60% with PostgreSQL 16 queries and minimal JavaScript — the exact stack that replaced a Node.js 20 microservice plan.

item.title: RAG in prod: why tutorials flop
item.description: Cut RAG latency 89% and AWS bill 73% by tuning pgvector indexes, BRIN filters, and pgBouncer pools — the exact steps most tutorials skip.

item.title: Ask for 80% of US salary as a remote dev in 2026
item.description: Ask for 80% of US salary as a remote dev in 2026 — COL-adjusted benchmarks, email template, and the Hetzner cron job that keeps the data fresh.

item.title: AI indexes your repo: context you never knew you needed
item.description: Cut repository query time 90% with repository intelligence — measure index build time, query latency, and staleness before you choose tooling. Learn what a good index looks like and where grep breaks first.

item.title: Pool size is the wrong knob to turn
item.description: Cut API response time 40% by fixing one connection pool setting — measure your TLS handshake cost and size your pool for burst tolerance, not CPU cores.

item.title: Choose PostgreSQL: why I pick it 9/10 times
item.description: PostgreSQL beats MySQL 7/10 times in 2026 latency tests — see the exact benchmarks, setup steps, and cost data you need to decide today.

item.title: No CS degree needed to become senior engineer
item.description: Cut 78% AWS cost without a CS degree — how debugging velocity, systems knowledge, and impact visibility beat LeetCode and formal education for senior roles in 2026.

item.title: AI scaffolding for non-traditional devs
item.description: Go from Python script to live API in 5 minutes with Deta Space and Railway in 2026. Free tiers, global edge networks, and rollback features compared for non-traditional developers.

item.title: Portfolio that hires: Africa's remote edge
item.description: Cut interview ghosting 50%: focus on one system with metrics, not GitHub stars — real AWS examples, p99 latency numbers, and the failure story that gets remote roles.

item.title: Debug LLM pipelines with observability
item.description: Instrument LLM pipelines and cut latency 30% — metrics, logging, and error handling for AI applications

item.title: Over-engineering costs more than you think
item.description: Cut API response time 97% without microservices — client-side filtering, Postgres materialized views, and one Redis instance beat a $18k over-engineered stack. Lessons from a 3-month detour.

item.title: Raise remote pay: Colombia to US rates
item.description: Raise remote pay 37% with USD-anchored quotes — bill-of-materials generator, negotiation tracker, and real 2026 numbers you can replicate today.

item.title: Debugged AI salary boosters in 2026
item.description: Cut to the chase: engineers with production AI models earn 30% more in 2026. See the exact skills that moved the needle — tabular ML vs modern GenAI — with benchmarks, costs, and code that actually works.

item.title: Vector DBs: 80ms vs 3ms for your use case
item.description: Cut semantic search latency 75% with these two stacks — 28 ms vs 22 ms median, $4k vs $8k first-year cost, and the exact knobs to tune pgvector 0.7.0 or Weaviate 1.24 in 2026.

item.title: Cellular backend tuning: the 5 rules you can’t ignore
item.description: Cut P99 latency 82% on mobile traffic — PostgreSQL pool tuning, Redis TTL, and the RRC state mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Cut 30% cloud carbon, keep 95th latency
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 30% without hurting user speed — how we shrank embodied carbon in CI, selective caching, and right-sized containers while keeping p95 latency at 285 ms.

item.title: RAG in prod: 3 traps no tutorial warns you about
item.description: Cut RAG latency 77% by respecting the LLM’s token budget — cache normalization, retriever guardrails, and Aurora rebuild costs most tutorials ignore. 3 concrete numbers, pgvector 0.7.0, Redis 7.2.

item.title: Big Tech leaves for $60k roles: the real reasons
item.description: Cut invisible meeting tax 11 hours per sprint with this 30-minute audit. Learn the real reasons big tech engineers leave despite six-figure salaries.

item.title: Choose the right real-time transport
item.description: Cut real-time transport latency 80% by choosing SSE for one-way or WebSockets for two-way traffic — RAM, cost, and browser limits for 2026

item.title: Overpaying for idle DB connections
item.description: Save $1,800/month on RDS costs by fixing one connection pool mistake most teams still copy from 2018 docs. Includes PostgreSQL 15 and Node.js 20 LTS examples and benchmarks.
